'''Qualtrough''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Approximately [[500 BBY/Legends|five hundred years before]] the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order's]] mobile [[Praxeum ship/Legends|praxeum ship]] called the ''[[Chu'unthor]]'' visited the world, and its Jedi occupants helped negotiate a truce amongst the local populace.<ref name="POTJ">''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]''</ref>
